title: Investigate deploy-staging nightly failure
description: The nightly 'deploy-staging' job (job_id: job_deploy_staging) failed. The error reported is a timeout communicating with the payment-api after 30s. This is blocking the staging deployment pipeline for the upcoming release. We need to analyze logs, identify root cause (likely network or dependency issue), and resolve.

title: Add rate limiting to notification service
description: Notifications are being sent too rapidly under load, causing downstream failures. Implement configurable rate limiter.

title: Update authentication library for security patch
description: Upgrade authlib from 2.1.3 to 2.1.5 to address CVE-2025-1234. No API changes expected.
